lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in mint condition. The exterior has no scratches or damage, and the interior is in like-new condition. Mechanically, the car is in perfect working order with no issues.

This vehicle is in absolute mint condition, presenting as if it just rolled off the showroom floor. The exterior paint is entirely flawless, with a deep, mirror-like finish and no evidence of stone chips or scratches. Inside, the cabin is immaculate; the premium upholstery remains taut and unmarked, and all interior components function perfectly. Mechanically, the car is in peak performance, having been meticulously maintained and stored in a climate-controlled environment. This is a rare opportunity to own a vehicle that has been preserved in showroom-quality condition.

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require significant mechanical and cosmetic work to be roadworthy. The exterior has several large dents, visible rust patches, and the paint is heavily faded. Mechanically, the engine struggles to stay running and the transmission slips between gears. Inside, the upholstery is torn and there are missing trim pieces. This car is being sold strictly as-is, best suited for a mechanic's project or as a donor vehicle for parts.

This vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has multiple scratches and some small dents. The interior shows visible wear and staining. Mechanically, the car is functional but will require maintenance work in the near future.
Poor condition.

Get ready for a fantastic value! This reliable ride is perfect for someone looking for a dependable vehicle at an approachable price point. While it shows some honest wear from its time on the road, it still has plenty of life left and is ready to get you where you need to go. It's a practical, hardworking car that's priced to sell!

This professionally maintained vehicle offers a sophisticated balance of performance and value. Presenting in commendable condition, the automobile features a well-preserved interior and a robust powertrain that ensures a reliable driving experience. It has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to verify its mechanical integrity and roadworthiness. This represents an exceptional acquisition for those seeking a dependable, high-caliber vehicle at a competitive market valuation.

Hey there! Are you looking for a reliable ride that’s ready for its next adventure? This car has been so good to me and is still in wonderful shape for its next owner. It runs smoothly, looks great, and is just waiting for someone to take it on a road trip! It’s a solid, dependable choice that you're going to love driving every day. Come take it for a spin!

Good condition. Runs well. Maintenance records available. Clean title. Priced for quick sale.

This meticulously maintained vehicle strikes a perfect balance between performance and comfort. The exterior boasts a deep, lustrous finish with only minor cosmetic imperfections consistent with careful road use, while the body remains straight and structurally sound. Inside, the cabin is exceptionally clean; the premium upholstery shows minimal wear, and all interior features—including the dual-zone climate control, infotainment system, and power-adjustable seating—are fully operational. Mechanically, the car is in robust health. It has been serviced at regular intervals, featuring a smooth-shifting transmission and a responsive engine that delivers power effortlessly. The suspension provides a quiet, composed ride, and the tires possess substantial tread life remaining on the original alloy wheels. This is a reliable, turn-key example that has been treated with respect and is ready for its next long-term owner.

This expertly maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking a balance of performance and value. Having undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection, the automobile demonstrates consistent mechanical reliability and a well-preserved aesthetic. The interior remains refined, while the exterior retains its professional profile, reflecting a history of diligent care. We invite you to experience the caliber of this exceptional offering, which stands ready to provide a sophisticated and dependable driving experience.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic preservation. This unit has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure peak operational performance and safety. Characterized by its reliable service history and well-preserved interior, it represents an exceptional opportunity for the discerning driver seeking a balance of luxury and proven longevity. We invite serious inquiries to experience the refined driving dynamics and sophisticated presence of this distinguished automobile.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my trusty ride, and she's been an absolute joy to drive. It's been super well-maintained and is ready to hit the road with a new owner! It’s perfect for daily commutes or weekend adventures, and it still looks great in the driveway. Come take it for a spin and see for yourself—you're going to love how it handles!

This E46 M3 features the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering linear power through six individual throttle bodies. The high-revving valvetrain is paired with a precise Getrag 6-speed manual transmission and a factory-spec M Variable Differential Lock. Recent preventative maintenance includes a comprehensive VANOS overhaul and rear subframe reinforcement, ensuring chassis integrity under high-torque loads. The suspension geometry remains true with refreshed bushings, and the engine pulls cleanly to its
Used car. Good condition. Reliable engine. Clean title. Regular maintenance records available.

This vehicle represents a fantastic balance of reliability and refined style, perfect for a driver who values a well-maintained machine. The exterior boasts a vibrant, glossy finish that has been regularly waxed, with only minor, negligible stone chips consistent with careful road use. Inside, the cabin is exceptionally clean and smoke-free; the upholstery is plush and free of any significant wear, while all electronic features—from the dual-zone climate control to the premium sound system—operate flawlessly. Mechanically, the car is in robust health, featuring a smooth-shifting transmission and a responsive engine that has benefited from timely, documented oil changes and recent brake service. It handles the road with a solid, confident feel, reflecting its history of diligent upkeep. Complete with a full set of service records, this car is ready for its next chapter without the need for immediate investment.

This vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver, balancing mechanical excellence with a refined aesthetic. Meticulously maintained and displaying consistent performance standards, it offers a superior driving experience that justifies its standing within our curated inventory. We invite you to inspect this exceptional example of engineering and reliability.

This vehicle represents a distinguished opportunity for the discerning buyer. Well-preserved and presenting in commendable condition, it offers a refined driving experience underpinned by consistent mechanical stewardship. The exterior retains its professional aesthetic, while the interior reflects a history of careful ownership. Thoroughly inspected to ensure adherence to our standards for performance and safety, this automobile stands ready for immediate acquisition.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my trusty car and it's looking for a new home! It’s been well-loved and is still in really solid shape for all your daily drives or weekend adventures. It runs great and has been super reliable for me. I'm sure you'll love it as much as I have—come check it out!

This E46 M3 is a driver-focused example featuring the high-revving S54B32 3.2L inline-six, utilizing individual throttle bodies and dual-VANOS variable valve timing for a linear power delivery up to its 8,000 RPM redline. The Getrag 6-speed manual transmission offers tactile shifts, paired with a factory limited-slip differential for optimal torque distribution. Preventive maintenance includes a reinforced rear subframe and a refreshed VANOS system, ensuring structural and mechanical reliability. The chassis maintains its signature balance with a MacPherson strut front and multi-link rear suspension setup that remains tight and responsive. While showing minor cosmetic patina consistent with its age, the powertrain and drivetrain are in robust mechanical health, making it an excellent candidate for the spirited enthusiast.
Used vehicle in good condition. Clean title. Routine maintenance performed. Reliable performance. Minor cosmetic wear.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a premium driving experience for the discerning buyer who values both performance and aesthetic appeal. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous shine, showing only the minor, inevitable signs of careful road use consistent with a well-loved car. Inside, the cabin is a smoke-free sanctuary featuring supple leather upholstery, crisp digital displays, and climate control that works perfectly. Mechanically, the car is robust; it has been serviced strictly according to the manufacturer’s schedule, ensuring the engine runs quietly and the transmission shifts with seamless precision. With a clean history and recent multi-point inspection, this car is ready for its next chapter without the need for immediate investment. It represents a fantastic opportunity to own a reliable, high-end vehicle that looks and feels significantly newer than its mileage suggests.

This expertly maintained vehicle exemplifies a balance of refined performance and enduring value. Subjected to a comprehensive professional inspection, it maintains mechanical integrity and a sophisticated presentation. An ideal selection for the driver seeking a dependable, high-caliber automotive investment that yields consistent performance and aesthetic appeal.

We are pleased to present this exceptionally well-maintained vehicle, offering a superior balance of performance and long-term value. Having undergone a comprehensive mechanical assessment, this unit remains in commendable condition, reflecting a history of diligent ownership. Its refined aesthetic and consistent service record make it a distinguished selection for the sophisticated buyer seeking a dependable, high-caliber driving experience.

Hey everyone! I’m parting ways with my absolute favorite ride, and it’s honestly been such a joy to own. It’s in wonderful shape, super reliable, and drives like a dream! Whether you’re commuting or heading out for a weekend getaway, this beauty is ready to hit the road with you. I've taken great care of it, and I'm sure you'll love it just as much as I have!

This E92 M3 is a purist’s specification, featuring the high-revving S65 4.0L V8 engine with its signature eight individual throttle bodies and an 8,400 RPM redline. Power is delivered to the rear wheels via a precise 6-speed manual transmission and the M Variable Differential Lock. The chassis remains sharp, utilizing aluminum double-jointed MacPherson struts up front and a five-link rear setup for superior kinematics. This example is in solid mechanical health with recent preventative maintenance on the rod bearings and throttle actuators. While showing minor aesthetic wear consistent with its well-maintained status, the engine pulls hard through the entire rev range, and the hydraulic steering rack provides excellent tactile feedback. A driver-focused machine ready for the canyons.
Used car in good condition. Well-maintained. Clean interior. Recent service completed. Ready to drive.

This well-maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between performance and daily practicality. The exterior finish retains a deep luster, showing only minor signs of road wear consistent with careful ownership. Inside, the smoke-free cabin is remarkably clean, featuring well-preserved upholstery and a fully functional suite of electronics. Mechanically, the car is in robust health; the engine runs smoothly, the transmission shifts with precision, and the suspension remains tight and responsive. It has been serviced at regular intervals, with a comprehensive maintenance log and a recent multi-point inspection already completed. This is a dependable, high-quality driver that has been treated with genuine care, ready for its next chapter on the road.

Presenting a distinguished example of automotive engineering, this vehicle has been curated for the driver who demands both reliability and sophistication. Meticulously inspected to ensure mechanical integrity, it offers a refined driving experience and remains in commendable condition throughout. This offering represents a superior acquisition for those seeking quality without compromise.
